;Partition          = 1

;Memo               = 
;IncidentMonochro   = Use
;CounterMonochro    = 
;Attachment         = Attachment for thin film
;Filter             = 
;SlitName0          = Attenuator Open
;SlitName1          = DivSlit Open
;SlitName2          = SctSlit 1mm
;SlitName3          = RecSlit Open
;SlitName4          = DivH.L.Slit 2.00mm
;SlitName5          = 1st slit No Use
;SlitName6          = 2nd slit No Use
;SlitName7          = Incident slit No Use
;Counter            = Scintillation counter

;KAlpha2            = 1.5444
;KBata              = 1.39222

;KV                 = 40
